name: Charades
summary: Pick an action, act it out, and score each round.
objective: Act out prompts so someone guesses the chosen action. In individual mode, the actor earns more points and the guesser scores too.

flow.choose: The actor or active team reveals one card and chooses one of three actions.
flow.act: The charade starts, with an optional timer configured before the game.
flow.score: Record who guessed correctly and follow the scoreboard to the final result.

rules: No talking, singing, spelling, or writing in the air.
In individual mode, the actor earns double the action points.
The correct guesser also earns the base points in individual mode.
In team mode, the active team scores when it guesses correctly.
tip: Start with the action context, then add the tricky details.
